violations.text: Restroom cleaner was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

Tongs were observed cleaned and sanitized and brought out for immediate use. Utensils shall be air-dried or used after adequate draining and may not be cloth dried except that utensils that have been air-dried may be polished with cloths that are maintained clean and dry. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the back room. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023
